title: Lockyz Extra Dimensions Mod
body:
[3.0.0 Roadmap](https://trello.com/b/MPQgi0FO/lockyz-extra-dimensions-mod)
# What is the LEDM

The LEDM is a mod that adds new and unique dimensions to Minecraft.

# What would I get out of this mod?

The LEDM adds 26 dimensions based off of blocks within Minecraft.

For example, there's an entire dimension based on Diamonds that allows you access to all the diamonds you could ever want.
